node.data: {"main_page":"HOME","main_page_title":"Home","contacts":"CONTACTS","contacts_title":"Contacts","archive":"ARCHIVE","archive_title":"Archive","welcome_text":"Welcome to VolgaCTF, an annual open competition in the field of cybersecurity","what_is_header_1":"WHAT IS","what_is_header_2":"VOLGA CTF?","what_is_text_1":"It is an international contest that gathers more than 1000 teams from all around the globe.","what_is_text_2":"Competition finals are held in Samara city and are hosted by Samara University in cooperation with IT and Communications Department of Samara Region","hero_header_1":"VOLGA CTF","hero_header_2":"IS:","hero_text_team":"The meeting place for active and committed young specialists in the field of cyber security.","hero_text_tribune":"The forum site where leading specialists both from Russia and from abroad share their experience with the new generation of cyber security professionals.","hero_text_heart":"VolgaCTF is friendship!","orgs_header":"COMPETITION ORGANISERS","how_to_contact_us":"WAYS TO CONTACT US","track_the_news":"FOLLOW THE NEWS","participation_questions":"Submit participation-related questions to","speakers":"Suggest a lecture/seminar via","partnership":"Offer your cooperation via","info":"Should you need any further information, consult the group","vk_text":"VKontakte community","teams_header_1":"PARTICIPANTS OF THE","teams_header_2":"COMPETITION","activity_header":"OTHER ACTIVITIES","partners_header_1":"PARTNERS AND","partners_header_2":"SPONSORS","streams_header":"VIDEO STREAM","schedule_header":"SCHEDULE","scoreboard_header":"SCOREBOARD","scoreboard_team":"Team","scoreboard_score":"Score","archive_header":"ARCHIVE","archive_text":"Past VolgaCTF competitions","report_header":"REPORT"}

ctfText.en: VolgaCTF 2025 Final will be held from 15 to 19 September 2025 at Lotte Hotel Samara
ctfText.ru: Финал соревнований VolgaCTF 2025 пройдёт в Самаре с 15 по 19 сентября 2025 года в Лотте Отель Самара
